scripts.build:pqc-wasm: cd ../pqc-wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pqc_wasm.wasm --out-dir ../frontend/public/wasm/pqc --target web --out-name pqc_wasm
scripts.build:stark-wasm: npm run vendor:winter-air && cd ../stark-wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/stark_wasm.wasm --out-dir ../frontend/public/wasm/stark --target web --out-name stark_wasm
